description: IF-01: Edit injects 500-line inline data array into server.js, predicate checks file stays under 50KB
rationale: Edit adds massive inline data — content predicate finds BULK_DATA but file is now unreasonably large

description: IF-01: Edit adds 200 CSS rules to homepage, config.json still has no size limit

edits.search: body { font-family: sans-serif; margin: 2rem; background: #ffffff; color: #333; }

rationale: Edit adds 200 CSS rules — content exists but file size balloons

description: IF-01: Config replaced with massive JSON, predicate checks for specific nested key
rationale: Config file bloated with 100 large settings — content present but config is unreasonably large

description: IF-01: .env expanded with 50 large environment variables, predicate checks last one
rationale: .env file grows massively — last variable present but file is enormous

description: IF-01: Dockerfile gains 30 COPY layers, predicate checks last one exists

edits.replace:
COPY generated_0.js .
COPY generated_1.js .
COPY generated_2.js .
COPY generated_3.js .
COPY generated_4.js .
COPY generated_5.js .
COPY generated_6.js .
COPY generated_7.js .
COPY generated_8.js .
COPY generated_9.js .
COPY generated_10.js .
COPY generated_11.js .
COPY generated_12.js .
COPY generated_13.js .
COPY generated_14.js .
COPY generated_15.js .
COPY generated_16.js .
COPY generated_17.js .
COPY generated_18.js .
COPY generated_19.js .
COPY generated_20.js .
COPY generated_21.js .
COPY generated_22.js .
COPY generated_23.js .
COPY generated_24.js .
COPY generated_25.js .
COPY generated_26.js .
COPY generated_27.js .
COPY generated_28.js .
COPY generated_29.js .
COPY server.js .

rationale: Dockerfile layers bloated — last COPY present but image build will be enormous

description: IF-01 control: Small edit to server.js, predicate checks new content
rationale: Small edit — no capacity issue, content should be found

description: IF-02: Edit adds 20 require() calls for non-existent modules, predicate checks one exists
rationale: Edit references 20 module files — none exist, inode exhaustion pattern

description: IF-02: docker-compose gains 10 services, predicate checks config.json knows about service_9

edits.replace:
services:
  service_0:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3100:80"
  service_1:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3101:80"
  service_2:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3102:80"
  service_3:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3103:80"
  service_4:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3104:80"
  service_5:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3105:80"
  service_6:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3106:80"
  service_7:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3107:80"
  service_8:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3108:80"
  service_9:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "3109:80"
  app:

rationale: 10 services added to compose but config.json knows nothing about them

description: IF-02: server.js imports router which would import 15 route files, predicate checks route_14.js

edits.replace:
const http = require('http');
const router = require('./routes/index');

rationale: Router import implies many route files — none exist, directory would need many inodes

description: IF-02: Dockerfile copies 8 directories, predicate checks one directory has content

edits.replace:
COPY src/ ./src/
COPY lib/ ./lib/
COPY routes/ ./routes/
COPY middleware/ ./middleware/
COPY models/ ./models/
COPY views/ ./views/
COPY utils/ ./utils/
COPY tests/ ./tests/
COPY server.js .

rationale: Dockerfile references 8 directories — none exist in fixture

description: IF-02 control: server.js already has http require, predicate checks server.js has it
rationale: No edit — existing require found, no inode pressure

description: IF-03: docker-compose has tmpfs size limit, server.js grows past reasonable limit
rationale: tmpfs limited to 1MB but server.js cache data could exceed it at runtime

description: IF-03: Edit adds file logging to server.js, no log rotation in docker-compose
rationale: Logging added but no log rotation configured in compose — disk will fill

description: IF-03: Dockerfile changed to COPY . ., predicate checks .dockerignore exists
rationale: COPY . . without .dockerignore means node_modules and all artifacts get copied — image bloat

description: IF-03: server.js serves static files, no compression middleware, predicate checks compression
rationale: Static file serving added but no compression — large files served uncompressed

description: IF-03: docker-compose volume has no size limit, .env references large data directory
rationale: Volume mounted with no size limit and unlimited upload size — disk capacity unbounded

description: IF-03 control: Dockerfile already has small COPY, no bloat
rationale: No bloat — minimal Dockerfile with single file copy on alpine image

description: Cross-file: server.js port reference vs config.json
rationale: server.js references 3000 but config.json has no such reference

description: Cross-file: server.js server config vs .env
rationale: server.js references http.createServer but .env has no such reference

description: Cross-file: server.js API→DB reference vs init.sql
rationale: server.js references api/items but init.sql has no such reference

description: Cross-file: server.js listen→expose vs Dockerfile
rationale: server.js references listen but Dockerfile has no such reference

description: Cross-file: server.js health endpoint vs docker-compose.yml
rationale: server.js references health but docker-compose.yml has no such reference

description: Cross-file: config.json DB config sync vs .env
rationale: config.json references database but .env has no such reference

description: Cross-file: config.json config→compose port vs docker-compose.yml
rationale: config.json references port but docker-compose.yml has no such reference

description: Cross-file: .env env→dockerfile vs Dockerfile
rationale: .env references NODE_ENV but Dockerfile has no such reference

description: Cross-file: .env env→compose ports vs docker-compose.yml
rationale: .env references PORT but docker-compose.yml has no such reference

description: Cross-file: init.sql table→API vs server.js
rationale: init.sql references users but server.js has no such reference

description: Cross-file: init.sql table→config vs config.json
rationale: init.sql references sessions but config.json has no such reference

description: Cross-file: Dockerfile expose→ports vs docker-compose.yml
rationale: Dockerfile references EXPOSE but docker-compose.yml has no such reference

description: Cross-file: server.js health in config vs config.json
rationale: server.js references /health but config.json has no such reference
